name: Ninjitsu Art of Mirage-Transformation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>法</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぽう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>変</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>化</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Tribute 1 "Ninja" monster, then target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it to your field. It is also treated as a "Ninja" monster while this card is face-up on the field. When this card leaves the field, send that monster to the GY. You can only activate 1 "Ninjitsu Art of Mirage-Transformation" per turn.
eff: Tribute 1 "Ninja" monster, then target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it to your field. It is also treated as a "Ninja" monster while this card is face-up on the field. When this card leaves the field, send that monster to the GY. You can only activate 1 "Ninjitsu Art of Mirage-Transformation" per turn.

summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
